title: leontodon obliquus
intro: Leontodon obliquus, also known as hawkbit or rough hawkbit, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leontodon obliquus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Leontodon obliquus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
